title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Mahindra Lifespace

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Mahindra Lifespace
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Lifespace has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
